articles.author: Graham Templeton
articles.title: James Webb Telescope Takes a First Peek Inside Uranus - extremetech.com
articles.description: The planet's upper atmosphere has been mapped for the first time, revealing one of the solar system's most enigmatic members.
articles.content: The European Space Agency announced Thursday that a study using the joint NASA/ESA-built James Webb Space Telescope has peered into Uranus's upper atmosphere. It's an important first step in revealin… [+2019 chars]
